creator: rob@zinkov.com
text:
I approve this patch.

On Mon, Jan 26, 2009 at 2:00 PM, Beech Rintoul <beech@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of security/audio/moc,
>
> Please note that PR ports/130994 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and I will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/130994
> --
> ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
> Beech Rintoul - FreeBSD Developer - beech@FreeBSD.org
